creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
It seems 4.1 pulls in lots of new ports.
It fails with x11-toolkits/py-gtk2:

grep: /usr/local/lib/libiconv.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/local/lib/libiconv.la: No such file or directory
libtool: link: `/usr/local/lib/libiconv.la' is not a valid libtool archive
gmake[4]: *** [glade.la] Error 1

I just submitted a separate PR on this.
Will update here when I get the PR number.
